title: Graduate Software Engineer
company_about: People-analytics platform used by millions of employees worldwide.
education_level: Bachelor's (can apply in your final year)
summary: Build and ship product features across a Python and React stack.
day_to_day: Pair with a senior engineer, pick up a ticket, write and review code, and deploy small changes to production most days.
career_advancement: Grow from Graduate to Software Engineer II within ~18 months with a dedicated mentor and clear progression framework.
description: A full-time graduate role for a recent STEM graduate. Ship real features from your first fortnight with regular pairing and mentorship. Culture Amp offers employer-sponsored visas and the skilled work supports a 189, 190 or 186 pathway.

title: Data Engineering Intern
company_about: Payments and financial tools for thousands of Australian businesses.
summary: Build and maintain data pipelines that move payment data reliably.
day_to_day: Write SQL, wire up a pipeline step, check data quality, and share progress in a short standup.
career_advancement: Convert to a part-time or graduate role after a strong internship and build toward a 485 application.
description: A paid internship suited to students within their study work-hour limits. Gain the local experience that strengthens a later 485 graduate application.

title: Junior Data Analyst
company_about: Global payments fintech and one of Australia's fastest-growing startups.
summary: Turn global payment data into clear answers for product and operations.
day_to_day: Pull data with SQL, build a dashboard, and present one insight to a product or ops team.
career_advancement: Progress to Analyst then Senior Analyst, or specialise into data science as the team scales.
description: SQL and curiosity matter more than years of experience. Employer sponsorship is available and skilled work counts toward a 189 or 190 pathway.

title: Frontend Engineer
company_about: The link-in-bio platform used by millions of creators.
summary: Ship accessible, high-quality UI to a shared design system.
day_to_day: Build a component, test it for accessibility, review a teammate's PR, and demo work at the end of the day.
career_advancement: Grow into a senior frontend or design-systems specialist with mentorship and conference budget.
description: Ideal for a graduate ready to grow. Sponsorship available; the role supports an ACS assessment for 261312 and a skilled-migration pathway.

title: Machine Learning Intern
company_about: Healthtech startup reaching hundreds of thousands of patients.
summary: Prototype and evaluate machine-learning models on real product data.
day_to_day: Clean a dataset, train a model, review results with your lead, and log an experiment.
career_advancement: Extend into a graduate ML or data-science role and publish internal research.
description: A paid internship to build a portfolio that supports a future 485 graduate visa.

title: DevOps Engineer
company_about: Leading web3 gaming platform building at global scale.
skill_assessment: ACS (263111 Computer Network and Systems Engineer)
summary: Keep infrastructure reliable and automate the path to production.
day_to_day: Improve a CI/CD pipeline, respond to an alert, write some Terraform, and pair on a reliability fix.
career_advancement: Move toward Senior DevOps or Platform Engineering as the platform grows.
description: Employer-sponsored role; the company can discuss 482 then 186, and the work maps to ACS occupation 263111.

title: Backend Developer
company_about: Accounting software powering over one million ANZ businesses.
summary: Build and maintain backend services that businesses rely on daily.
day_to_day: Implement an API endpoint, write tests, review a PR, and join a design discussion.
career_advancement: Progress from Junior to Software Engineer with a structured capability framework.
description: Skilled work toward a 189, 190 or 186 pathway. Not actively interviewing this week, but applications are reviewed for upcoming rounds.

title: Product Analyst
company_about: Hospitality-tech startup for ordering and payments.
education_level: Bachelor's (can apply in your final year)
summary: Measure how features perform and help shape the product roadmap.
day_to_day: Define a metric, analyse a feature launch, and share a recommendation with product managers.
career_advancement: Grow into a Senior Product Analyst or move into product management.
description: A full-time graduate role that builds skilled experience toward general skilled migration.

title: QA Engineering Intern
company_about: Workforce-management software used around the world.
summary: Help ship reliable software by testing features and automating checks.
day_to_day: Write a test case, automate a check, file a clear bug, and verify a fix with an engineer.
career_advancement: Move into a graduate QA or software engineering role with mentoring.
description: A paid internship that builds local STEM experience toward a 485 graduate application.

title: Cloud Support Engineer
company_about: Workplace-tech startup for visitor and contractor management.
skill_assessment: ACS (263111 Computer Network and Systems Engineer)
summary: Keep cloud infrastructure healthy and help customers stay unblocked.
day_to_day: Triage a support ticket, investigate logs in AWS, fix a config, and document the resolution.
career_advancement: Convert from contract to permanent and grow toward a cloud or DevOps engineering role.
description: A 6-month contract with a strong chance of extension. Sponsorship can be discussed; skilled work counts toward a 189 or 190 pathway.
